steps.title: Read two boundary points from the graph
steps.content: The shaded region's boundary is $rx+ty=-77$. From the graph, two clear points on the boundary are $(0,-11)$ and $(-7,-10)$.

steps.title: Compute r + t
steps.content: Use $(0,-11)$ first:$$0r-11t=-77\Rightarrow t=7$$Then use $(-7,-10)$:$$-7r-10(7)=-77$$ $$-7r-70=-77\Rightarrow r=1$$Therefore $r+t=1+7=8$, which matches A.

steps.title: Confirm the shortcut
steps.content: You only need the boundary line because $r$ and $t$ come from the equality $rx+ty=-77$. The shading direction is irrelevant for $r+t$.
